data.title: Warren Foresees Market Turmoil if Trump Dismisses Fed's Powell: If Powell Can Be Fired by Trump, 'It Will Crash Markets'
data.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) has cautioned about a possible stock market collapse if President Trump decides to fire Fed Chair Jerome Powell.

data.title: China's Boeing Ban Could Backfire On Its Own Aircraft Manufacturer, Comac
data.description: China's recent move to pause Boeing aircraft purchases may end up hurting its own jet maker, Comac, which depends heavily on U.S. technology.

data.title: Xi Jinping's Minister Urges Nvidia, US Firms To Invest More In China During Meeting With Jensen Huang, Despite Chip Export Curbs
data.description: Chinese Vice Premier He Lifeng has extended an invitation to US enterprises, including Nvidia Corporation (NASDAQ: NVDA), to enhance their footprint in the Chinese market.

data.title: Peter Schiff Rings Alarm After Foreign Investors Dump $6.5 Billion In US Equities In A Week, Quips 'Trump Thought Tariffs Would Bring Capital Into America'
data.description: The turmoil in U.S. equity markets has spooked foreign investors, leading to massive outflows over the past week, as tariff-related uncertainties continue to persist.

data.title: Trump's Energy Department Mulls Cutting Billions In Clean-Energy Funds, Threatening Exxon, Occidental Projects
data.description: The U.S. Energy Department (DoE) is reportedly contemplating substantial reductions, potentially halting nearly $10 billion in federal funding for clean-energy projects. This move could jeopardize high-profile collaborations with Exxon Mobil (NYSE: XOM) and Occidental Petroleum (NYSE: OXY).
